incident_summary: Batch B9454A release certificate issued with incorrect product strength — 191mg stated, correct strength is 91mg. Identified by pharmacist on receipt at hospital.
root_cause_detail: Certificate auto-populated from LIMS but product strength field pulled from wrong database field following a system configuration change 2 weeks prior.
corrective_action: Batch recalled from hospital. Correct certificates reissued. All certificates issued in 2-week period reviewed — 3 additional certificates found with same error, recalled and corrected.
preventive_action: Certificate field mapping validated after every LIMS configuration change. Certificate content spot-checked by QA against batch record before electronic issuance — strength mandatory check.
effectiveness_check: Zero certificate content errors for 12 months. 100% post-configuration change certificate validation compliance.
